creator: d8zNeCFG@aon.at
text:
Yes, this seems to be a bug in kwin. The file src/plugins/screencast/screencaststream.cpp guards against using F_SEAL if it is not available, but src/utils/ramfile.* does not.

Most likely this can be fixed by a few well-placed #ifdef F_SEAL_SEAL or similar.

That being said, thank you very much to the FreeBSD KDE team to have managed to bring plasma 5.26 to FreeBSD!

-- Martin
